svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="app.diagrams.net"> <diagram name="Zeitlimit-Workflow" id="0"> <mxGraphModel dx="1829" dy="1014" grid="1" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="1" page="1" pageScale="1" pageWidth="827" pageHeight="1169" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="start" parent="1" style="ellipse;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;" value="Start" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="60" x="320" y="20" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="dash" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;" value="Dashboard anzeigen
(Liste der Zeitlimits)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="220" x="240" y="110" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="all" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;" value="Zeitlimit für 'Alle Apps' eingeben" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="220" x="240" y="210" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="valid1" parent="1" style="rhombus;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;" value="Eingabe gültig?" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="130" x="285" y="320" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="err1" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;" value="Fehlermeldung anzeigen
und erneut eingeben" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="180" x="500" y="320" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="save1" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;" value="Limit für alle Apps speichern" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="220" x="240" y="430" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="addapp" parent="1" style="rhombus;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;" value="App hinzufügen?" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="130" x="285" y="530" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="select" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;" value="App auswählen / hinzufügen" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="220" x="240" y="640" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="appLimit" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;" value="Zeitlimit für ausgewählte App eingeben" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="220" x="240" y="740" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="valid2" parent="1" style="rhombus;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;" value="Eingabe gültig?" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="130" x="285" y="850" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="err2" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;" value="Fehlermeldung anzeigen
und erneut eingeben" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="180" x="500" y="850" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="save2" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;" value="Limit für App speichern" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="220" x="240" y="960" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="overview" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;" value="Übersicht aktualisieren und anzeigen" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="260" x="220" y="1070" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="end" parent="1" style="ellipse;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;" value="Ende" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="60" x="320" y="1170" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e1" edge="1" parent="1" source="start" target="dash"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e2" edge="1" parent="1" source="dash" target="all"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e3" edge="1" parent="1" source="all" target="valid1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e4" edge="1" parent="1" source="valid1" target="err1" value="Nein"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e5" edge="1" parent="1" source="valid1" target="save1" value="Ja"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e6" edge="1" parent="1" source="err1" target="all"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e7" edge="1" parent="1" source="save1" target="addapp"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e8" edge="1" parent="1" source="addapp" target="select" value="Ja"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e9" edge="1" parent="1" source="select" target="appLimit"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e10" edge="1" parent="1" source="appLimit" target="valid2"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e11" edge="1" parent="1" source="valid2" target="err2" value="Nein"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e12" edge="1" parent="1" source="err2" target="appLimit"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e13" edge="1" parent="1" source="valid2" target="save2" value="Ja"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e16" edge="1" parent="1" source="overview" target="end"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="FQCSC4PhRofr8jA4OCaP-1" edge="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="349.62" y="1020" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="349.62" y="1070" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="FQCSC4PhRofr8jA4OCaP-2" edge="1" parent="1" source="addapp" style="exitX=0;exitY=0.5;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;entryX=0;entryY=0.5;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="end" value="Nein"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <Array as="points"> <mxPoint x="160" y="570" /> <mxPoint x="160" y="1200" /> </Array> <mxPoint x="110" y="580" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="180" y="1190" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>
